items.title: Fiji Immigration External Management System
items.description: A secure digital self-service platform enabling individuals, employers, and businesses to apply for visas, work permits, residence permits, citizenship, investor permits, study permits, and other immigration services online. The portal streamlines application submission, document uploads, appointment scheduling, payment integration, application tracking, and status notifications through a modern role-based experience.

detail.overview: The Fiji Immigration External Management System is a secure, scalable government portal built to streamline the end-to-end visa and permit application process for international applicants, employers and businesses. It replaces a counter-and-paper workflow with a guided online journey — reducing manual data entry, making every application status transparent to the applicant, and cutting the turnaround time officers need to reach a decision.
challenges: Handling large passport and supporting-document uploads securely, with strict size and format validation.
Implementing a multi-step application flow that stays resumable across sessions and categories.
Keeping applicants informed with real-time status updates and notifications.
Maintaining performance with large datasets on the reporting and listing screens.
solutions: Chunked file uploads with per-file progress indicators and client-side validation.
A reusable stepper plus typed form components shared across every permit category.
RxJS-driven polling and push notifications for live application status.
Optimized API calls with lazy loading, virtual scrolling and response caching.
detail.quote: Great systems are built with clarity of purpose, clean code, and a focus on user impact.

items.title: Fiji Immigration Internal Management System
items.description: An enterprise-grade internal platform built for immigration officers and government administrators to manage end-to-end immigration operations. The system supports application assessment, document verification, workflow automation, permit approvals, visa processing, citizenship management, border operations, compliance monitoring, reporting, user administration, and role-based access control across multiple immigration services.

items.title: PRIMS Member Portal
items.description: A secure self-service pension portal that empowers members to manage their retirement accounts online. The platform provides real-time access to contribution history, account balances, benefit statements, personal profile management, document services, claim submissions, beneficiary details, and retirement-related information through an intuitive, responsive user experience.

items.title: VNPF blo mi — Member Mobile Application
items.description: A secure cross-platform mobile application developed for Vanuatu National Provident Fund (VNPF), enabling members to conveniently manage their provident fund services anytime, anywhere. The app provides real-time access to account balances, contribution history, loan details, withdrawal requests, insurance information, and member profile management, while allowing users to submit loan, insurance, and withdrawal applications through a seamless digital experience.

items.title: Zellavora AI Resume Builder
items.description: An AI-powered resume builder that turns guided inputs into tailored, ATS-friendly resumes — pairing a live preview editor with AI content generation and one-click PDF export.

items.title: AI Task Manager
items.description: Smart task management app with AI suggestions and productivity insights.

items.title: Personal Finance Tracker
items.description: Track expenses, set budgets & achieve financial goals with beautiful analytics.

items.title: Telehealth Platform
items.description: Remote consultation platform connecting doctors and patients seamlessly.

items.title: 3D Portfolio Experience
items.description: An immersive 3D interactive portfolio experience using Three.js and WebGL.
